valuationMethod: ZRA motor vehicle calculator and specific-duty schedule friendly workflow with uploadable official tables.

ageRules.message: This pack does not enforce a simple age ban; official schedule duty can vary by vehicle and year.

steeringRules.message: Right-hand drive is normally expected for the local road environment.

inspectionRules.message: Other agencies can impose additional fees; use the extra agency charges field when known.

sourceNotes.name: ZRA motor vehicle tax calculator
sourceNotes.note: Used for architecture reference and official calculator path.

sourceNotes.name: ZRA used motor vehicle specific duty rates
sourceNotes.note: Seed pack is designed to import the official schedule as structured JSON.

disclaimers: Zambia is modelled as schedule-friendly, not just percentage-of-CIF math.
Specific-duty schedule rows must be verified manually or imported from the latest ZRA file before relying on the result.
Other agencies can impose additional charges; use the optional field when known.

faqs.question: Why does Zambia show a schedule estimate?
faqs.answer: ZRA motor vehicle calculations can depend on specific duty schedules. The engine supports schedule lookup and falls back to a clearly labelled percentage estimate only when no schedule row is available.

faqs.question: Can I view Zambia totals in USD and kwacha?
faqs.answer: Yes. The calculator shows USD for reproducibility and ZMW using the FX rate stored with the quote.

copy.intro: Estimate a Zambia vehicle import with a ZRA schedule-friendly engine, customs taxes, ASYCUDA-style processing, agency buffers, inland movement, and registration.
copy.hiddenCosts: The common misses are official schedule row differences, other agency charges, long inland delivery from port corridors, and exchange-rate movement.
